subject: [PATCH 0/9] Deliver TLS session tags to upper-layer consumers (NFSD)

reviews.author: Chuck Lever
reviews.summary: Reviewer Chuck Lever expressed frustration that the patch did not apply cleanly to any known tree, specifically asking what tree this patch is based on.
reviews.raw_body:
commit 4d4d6605de5f91a40335729b6a7cc15e83b280f3 (cel/nfsd-testing)
Author:     Chuck Lever <chuck.lever@oracle.com>
AuthorDate: Thu Sep 5 15:25:37 2024 -0400
Commit:     Chuck Lever <chuck.lever@oracle.com>
CommitDate: Thu May 28 11:34:51 2026 -0400

That's some old shit.

I will rebase it before posting it again.


-- 
Chuck Lever

2026-06-06.patch_summary: This patch series aims to deliver TLS session tags to upper-layer consumers, specifically NFSD (Network File System Daemon), but it appears to have issues with applying cleanly to any known tree.
